title: Hopskip

{{Quote|Their ship, the ''Hopskip'', is a piece of trash that Crisk wouldn't use to haul dead bodies, much less valuable merchandise.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], to [[Hal Horn]]|<ref name="Side Trip">"[[Side Trip]]"</ref>}}
The '''''Hopskip''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] operated by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Haber Trell]] and [[Maranne Darmic]], who mainly smuggled weapons for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Derra IV/Legends|Derra IV]]. It was destroyed by the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Group]] [[Battle of Derra IV|above]] Derra IV.

{{Ship-stub}}
